home.title: Welcome to
home.description:
We are a proud Sea Scout troop that provides children and young people with 
a safe place to grow, learn seamanship, and make lifelong friends.
home.ig_description: Step into our everyday life, camps, sailing, knots and camaraderie. See our adventures, friendships and memories that we create together.
home.discover_title: Discover life as a sea scout
